name: navigate_to
description:
Navigate the G1 robot to a target XY position using the locomotion policy.

    Starts the policy walk if it is not already running (policy_path required in that
    case), then continuously steers the robot toward the goal each physics step.
    Returns immediately (non-blocking). Call get_navigation_status() to monitor
    progress and stop_navigation() to cancel early.

    Args:
        target_position: [x, y] world coordinates in metres.
        robot_prim_path: USD prim path of the robot root (default "/G1").
        policy_path: Path to the trained locomotion policy (.pt/.pth). Required if
                     start_g1_policy_walk has not already been called.
        arrival_threshold: Distance in metres at which the robot is considered
                           arrived (default 0.5 m).

    Example:
        navigate_to(target_position=[5.0, 3.0], policy_path="/path/to/policy.pt")
        # Returns: "Navigation started toward [5.00, 3.00]. Call get_navigation_status() to monitor."
